messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: A message the human sends can be destroyed with no trace, and nobody is ever woken for it
What it solves: THE INCIDENT. On 2026-07-13 the human asked, in SUP-2: "Why is the operator not staying up in
attended mode when asked to do so?" It reached the thread transcript (`.swarmforge/support/threads/
SUP-2.json`, message 46) and then reached NOBODY — no event on either operator queue, no Operator
ever wo…
How it works: A message arriving while the queue is being claimed is still owned
